$comment: Manifest of FITS files used by the e2e suite. Files are too large to commit; global-setup.ts downloads them from `base_url + name`, caches them under ~/.cache/psf-guard-e2e-fixtures/, and verifies sha256 before use. Update `release_tag` whenever a new release tag is published; the rest derives from it. Override the base URL entirely with PSF_GUARD_E2E_FIXTURE_BASE.
